# Title

Short description: One or two sentences summarizing the experience and lesson.

## Target Audience

- Who can learn from this experience?
- What situation is this most relevant to?

## Core Question

What practical question does this lesson answer?

## Main Content

Describe the situation, what happened, what was learned, and what should be done differently next time.

Give a concrete example or scenario that makes the lesson easier to understand.

- What was the real cause of the problem?
- What evidence supports this lesson?
- What could be misunderstood?
- How would this lesson change in another context?
